scope: Every term registered in spec/registry.json plus every current public object, role, action, semantic field, state, result and high-risk enum identifier.
normalization: Human phrases are converted to lowercase snake_case only for keyword comparison. Normative spellings remain the values declared by their owning specification.

retained_proper_names.reason: Project brand; not a machine field, command, enum or unqualified package coordinate.
Core artifact name and endem command candidate; final oral distinction and distribution checks remain required before release.

migrations.reason: Remove an unnecessary coined name and expose the closure responsibility.
Use the established engineering object name and expose the one-session boundary.
Use a readable record name without implying truth or sufficiency.
Remove the initial kt cluster and state the write responsibility directly.
Avoid a brand-like spelling and state the independent read responsibility.
Use an ordinary role phrase that exposes the execution limit.
Remove an unpredictable coined action spelling.
Use the familiar production-side check term without colliding with SQL CHECK.
Use an ordinary verb for closure construction.
Use the ordinary read-only inspection action.
Use the ordinary bounded execution action.
Expose the original-expression responsibility.
Expose that the field stores an authorized projection, not raw source.
Use the established neutral possible-state term.
Separate the direction from the situation and the result.
Expose the verification contract.
Expose the semantic gap without a coined spelling.
Separate an observation from evidence and satisfaction.
Use a short ordinary direction word.
Use a conventional continuity verb.
Use the ordinary result word for insufficient evidence.
State the precise semantic failure instead of another coined label.
Avoid implying an external interrupt when any bounded stop condition may apply.
Avoid SQL GRANT and Go/Swift defer keyword collisions and distinguish an unresolved authorization from a final deferred decision.
Avoid the C# fixed keyword and expose the time representation.
Avoid SQL and Swift keyword collisions and make collection semantics explicit.
